race.comment: BIRD WHISTLE (5) smart filly who was three weeks between runs when collared late for a tough second over 1600m at this track in BM78 grade. Comes back a level and ticks plenty of boxes from the good gate. NITRO (4) winkers go on for this and gives every indication of running a solid 1600m. Comes out of a decent rating contest after making good late ground to run fourth over 1400m at this track. Can race a touch closer and has genuine winning prospects. LIPSTICK (13) hard fit for this and due for a change of luck. Ticks a few boxes from the inside gate and don't underestimate. DUVANA (1) talented on his day and must be kept safe at the good each way price.
